packageRules.description: Individual PRs for go module patch bumps (auto-approved after CI passes)
Individual PRs for go module digest bumps (pseudo-versions have no semver guarantees, treated as minor)
Individual PRs for go module minor bumps
Individual PRs for go module major bumps (no groupName = one PR per package)
Group Kubernetes and controller-runtime updates together
Label patch version bumps
Label gomod digest bumps as minor — pseudo-versions lack semver guarantees and need impact analysis
Label non-gomod digest bumps as patch
Label minor version bumps
Label major version bumps
Label direct dependencies
Label transitive (indirect) dependencies
Prioritize Konflux tekton task reference updates
Dockerfile updates (except Go toolchain, auto-approved after CI passes)
Go toolchain updates require manual review
RPM lockfile updates (auto-approved after CI passes)
Block kueue upgrades beyond 0.14.x — infra-deployments kueue only serves v1beta1 with no conversion webhook, and kueue >=0.15 requires v1beta2
Block k8s library upgrades beyond 0.34.x — kueue v0.14.x is incompatible with k8s >=0.35 due to breaking API changes (e.g. FindMatchingUntoleratedTaint signature)
Block controller-runtime upgrades beyond 0.22.x — kueue v0.14.x is incompatible with controller-runtime >=0.23 due to breaking changes in webhook and defaulter interfaces
Block tektoncd/pipeline upgrades beyond 1.10.x — v1.11+ pulls k8s >=0.35 which is incompatible with kueue v0.14.x
